backstory.original: Dob is an enthusiastic, energetic music-maker who never lets a little thing like 'not having a plan' stand in the way of action. His sister, Suzette, raised him. When he fell ill, she attempted various, wild cures leaving Dob with a permanent, lurid green hue to his skin. Dob became a traveling bard, self-taught in music and magic. This brought him into contact with the Oxventurers, with whom he shares many bizarre adventures. Accomplished and charismatic, this bard favours lulling enemies to sleep or hard-rocking spell attacks with acrobatic combat. Dob also carries Ethelfrith's Hammer, a cursed weapon with the power to summon 60 obedient skeletons, but exacts a heavy price for doing so.
backstory.display: 多比是一位热情奔放且精力充沛的音乐家，从不让“没有计划”这样的小事妨碍行动。他的姐姐苏赛特抚养他长大。有次他生病时，姐姐尝试了各种各样的疯狂疗法，使多比的皮肤永久呈现出可怕的绿色。多比成了一名四处旅行的吟游诗人，自学了音乐和魔法。这使他接触到了公牛冒险公会，并与公会成员们共同体验了许多光怪陆离的冒险。这位吟游诗人技艺精湛，魅力非凡，喜欢用摇篮曲催眠敌人，或通过杂耍般的战技来施放猛烈的法术攻击。多比还挥舞埃塞弗里斯之锤。这是一把被诅咒的武器，能够召唤 60 具骷髅仆从，但也需要为此付出沉重的代价。

description.original: Dob leaps to the closest enemy and attacks with a wave of thunder, knocking them back.
description.display: 多比跳向最近的敌人，使用雷电波攻击，将敌人击退。

longDescription.original: Dob leaps out to the closest enemy and plays a chord on his Lute that sends out a magical blast of thunder and lightning, damaging all enemies in the area and pushing them back a short distance.
longDescription.display: 多比跳向最近的敌人，使用鲁特琴弹奏和弦，发射一道魔法闪电雷霆波，伤害该区域的所有敌人，并将其击退一小段距离。

description.original: Summoned skeletons build a wall that lasts for 20 seconds. Evil Champions deal extra damage for the duration.
description.display: 召唤的骷髅会建造一道墙，持续 20 秒。邪恶勇士在此期间造成额外伤害。

longDescription.original: Dob uses the hammer to summon a bunch of skeletons to build a wall that lasts 20 seconds, dealing damage to enemies in the way. For the duration, evil Champions deal +1000% damage for reasons best left unsaid.
longDescription.display: 多比使用锤子召唤一堆骷髅建造一道墙，持续 20 秒，并对沿途的敌人造成伤害。在此期间，邪恶勇士造成的伤害提高 1000%，原因保密。

description.original: Dob buffs the damage of Champions NOT adjacent to him, keep him away from your main damage dealer.
description.display: 多比提高不与他相邻的勇士的伤害，让他远离你的主要伤害输出成员。

description.original: Everytime you change areas Dob has a chance to dump all your saved gold in a lake.  This buffs all his other abilities for the rest of the adventure.
description.display: 每次改变区域时，多比都有几率将你保存的所有金币倒入湖中。此增益效果将在接下来的冒险中强化他的所有其他技能。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions NOT next to him by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使不与他相邻的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Dob boosts the damage of all Champions NOT adjacent to him, keep him away from your DPS.
tipText.display: 多比使所有不与他相邻的勇士的伤害提高，让他远离你的伤害输出成员。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases global gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion next to him, stacking multiplicatively.
每位与$(source_hero)相邻的勇士均使金币寻获量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

At the transition to each new area, there is a $(amount)% chance that Dob sets the Champion's gold amount to zero and gains Deposit stacks equal to the exponent of the lost gold. Dob increases both the damage increase of Traveling Entertainer and the gold find bonus of Busking by $(traveling_entertainer_buff)% for each Deposit stack, stacking additively and applied multiplicatively. Number of Deposit stacks is capped at $(deposit_stack_cap_mult) times the highest area completed in the current adventure.

在向每个新区域过渡时，多比有 $(amount)%的几率将勇士的金币数量设为零，并获得等同于所损失金币数量的“押金”层数。每层“押金”均使多比的“旅行艺人”伤害提升效果和“街头表演”的金币寻获加成提高 $(traveling_entertainer_buff)%，以加算方式堆叠，以乘算方式应用。“押金”的堆叠上限为当前冒险中已完成的最高区域的 $(deposit_stack_cap_mult) 倍。

tipText.original: Sometimes when heading to a new area, Dob helpfully throws all your saved gold into a lake. Each time he does this his other abilities are buffed!
tipText.display: 每当前往一个新区域时，多比有时会好心将你保存的金币全部扔进湖里。每次他这么做之后，他的其他技能都会得到增强！

description.desc: Dob increases the attack bonus of Traveling Entertainer by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Oxventures Champion or Champion with a magical base attack, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
每个公牛冒险公会勇士或具备魔法基本攻击的勇士均使多比的“旅行艺人”攻击加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算堆叠并应用。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.display: 多比与他的魔法伙伴成为朋友

description.desc: Dob increases the attack bonus of Traveling Entertainer by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Oxventures Champion or Champion with a Charisma of 17 or higher, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
每个公牛冒险公会勇士或魅力大于等于 17 的勇士均使多比的“旅行艺人”攻击加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算堆叠并以加算应用。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.display: 多比与他的魅力伙伴成为朋友

description.desc: Dob increases the attack bonus of Traveling Entertainer by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Oxventures Champion or Champion with a Dexterity of 17 or higher, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
每个公牛冒险公会勇士或敏捷大于等于 17 的勇士均使多比的“旅行艺人”攻击加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算堆叠并以加算应用。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.display: 多比与他的灵巧伙伴成为朋友

description.desc: Dob increases the attack bonus of Traveling Entertainer by $(not_buffed amount)% for each unique species in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中的每个独特种族均使多比的“旅行艺人”攻击加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠并应用。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.display: 多比与所有种族都是朋友

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,8742,8743,8744,8745","description":"Increases the effect of Dob's Befriend abilities by $(amount)%."}

description.display: 这是值得吸取教训的时刻。
每个人都有回报。除了我们。

description.original: It's really not that bad, folks!

description.display: 准备摇摆吧！或者听首摇篮曲！

description.original: Sing along if you know the words!
description.display: 如果你知道歌词，那就跟着唱！

description.original: I know all sorts of things you don't know about. Probably.
description.display: 我知道各种你不知道的事情。也许吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dob's Befriend abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: We can put it in the lake!
description.display: 我们可以把钱放进湖里！

effects.description: Increases the chance for Dob's Offshore Accounting ability to trigger by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Dob is an enthusiastic, energetic music-maker who never lets a little thing like 'not having a plan' stand in the way of action. His sister, Suzette, raised him. When he fell ill, she attempted various, wild cures leaving Dob with a permanent, lurid green hue to his skin. Dob became a traveling bard, self-taught in music and magic. This brought him into contact with the Oxventurers, with whom he shares many bizarre adventures. Accomplished and charismatic, this bard favours lulling enemies to sleep or hard-rocking spell attacks with acrobatic combat. Dob also carries Ethelfrith's Hammer, a cursed weapon with the power to summon 60 obedient skeletons, but exacts a heavy price for doing so.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Dob is a Support Gold Find Champion who steals gold from the party to increase champion damage and gold find.

event_upgrades.name: Traveling Entertainer
event_upgrades.description: Dob buffs the damage of Champions NOT adjacent to him, keep him away from your main damage dealer.

event_upgrades.name: Offshore Accounting
event_upgrades.description: Everytime you change areas Dob has a chance to dump all your saved gold in a lake.  This buffs all his other abilities for the rest of the adventure.
